purpose: Compact navigation for the current multidimensional verification model.
workflow: Define one bounded claim and claims not made.
Load exact inputs and expected-value sources.
Perform fresh operations and record outputs/errors.
Record pass, mismatch, unavailable, inconclusive, or error per target.
Choose the weakest supported digital profile.
Report physical observation and external witness separately.
State limitations and downgrade when needed.
Use Builder doctor and Gateway preflight for public submission.

context_only.minimum: Sources read and summarized; explicit statement that no independent technical verification was performed.

reference_checked.minimum: Primary or external reference queried; target, access path/time, observed result, and limitations recorded.

integrity_checked.minimum: Exact bytes/proof material checked locally; expected source, operation, output, comparison, and limits recorded.
integrity_checked.note: V4 compatibility requires official-script source review before local execution.

independent_reproduction.minimum: Material result reproduced with independent code, parser, or toolchain; inputs, outputs, comparison, mismatches, and limits recorded.

full_public_digital.minimum: Complete declared public target inventory checked or listed unavailable; per-target results and limitations recorded.

downgrade_rules: Official script run without source review: no audited-script claim.
Missing expected-value source: no successful integrity-match claim.
Only official tools used: not independent_reproduction.
Photos or recorded video only: public_media_review.

legacy_policy.rule: The legacy field is compatibility metadata; current dimensions carry the meaning.
